subject: [PATCH v6 1/1] numa: add 'memmap-type' option for memory type configuration

reviews.author: Huang, (Jerry)
reviews.summary: Good catch, thanks for spotting this! You're right, there's no reason to hardcode 4 GiB here \u2014 on AMD hosts with IOMMU, above_4g_mem_start gets relocated to above 1 TB, so the hardcode would produce a wrong address. You're right, it should be: guest_addr = x86ms->above_4g_mem_start + (addr - x86ms->below_4g_mem_size); I'll send a v7 shortly with this fix. Jerry Huang
